Intro_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "4C0CF34B477503D489C4BAAE9D221C0B", "Welcome to the planet Aethus, Pioneer! These tutorials will help you guide Maeve and Roland on their first steps towards making their fortune. You can open and close this window at any time using (T). New tutorials will appear in the list to the left and can be selected with (LMB). Only the most critical information required to progress will be shown in these tutorials - you can view more detail about a tutorial within the Journal (J) at any time. Use the buttons at the bottom of this window to navigate forwards and backwards through each step in any given tutorial. Press Next now to learn how to move Maeve around the world.")

Intro_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "0AE330614B3884B9A3E692829EC095E1", "You can move Maeve around the world with (W)/(A)/(S)/(D). Hold (SHIFT) to run and (SPACE) to jump. You can rotate the camera by holding (MMB) and moving the mouse. You can zoom the camera by holding (CTRL) and using (MMB Scroll). Continue along the canyon until you arrive at the site for your Outpost!")
